per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student did not identify any of the critical issues present in the AI output.
The analysis was vague and lacked specific details regarding the performance of the proposed algorithm.
The evaluation did not effectively consider the original problem or key elements and constraints.

justification: The student demonstrated insufficient understanding across all criteria, failing to identify critical issues, provide thorough analysis, and consider the original problem, resulting in a fundamentally flawed evaluation.
